Test_Objective: Verify that an authenticated user can access the Viet Kudo modal
Precondition: User is logged in with valid credentials
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Kudos page
2. Click the "Viet Kudo" button
Expected_Result: Modal opens successfully

Test_Objective: Verify that an unauthenticated user cannot access the Viet Kudo modal
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Kudos page (or attempt to)
2. Attempt to click the "Viet Kudo" button
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login page or the button is not visible/accessible

Test_Objective: Verify modal overlay covers the background content
Precondition: User is authenticated and on the Kudos page
Steps:
1. Click the "Viet Kudo" button
2. Observe the background
Expected_Result: Semi-transparent overlay covers the entire background; background content is not clickable

Test_Objective: Verify modal appears centered on the viewport
Steps:
1. Click the "Viet Kudo" button
2. Observe modal position
Expected_Result: Modal is centered horizontally and vertically on the screen

Test_Objective: Verify all fields are in default state when modal first opens
Steps:
1. Click the "Viet Kudo" button
2. Observe all form fields
Expected_Result: All fields are empty/default; recipient field is blank; textarea shows placeholder; no hashtags selected; no images uploaded; anonymous toggle is off; "Gui" button is disabled
Specs: Design items B, D, E, F, G, H

Test_Objective: Verify modal opens when user clicks the "Viet Kudo" button on the parent screen
Precondition: User is authenticated and on the Kudos page
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Kudos page
2. Click the "Viet Kudo" button
Expected_Result: Modal "Gui loi cam on va ghi nhan den dong doi" displays correctly with overlay background

Test_Objective: Verify modal opens correctly when user double-clicks the trigger button
Precondition: User is authenticated and on the Kudos page
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Kudos page
2. Double-click the "Viet Kudo" button
Expected_Result: Modal opens once (not duplicated); displays correctly without error

Test_Objective: Verify modal opens when user navigates to trigger button via Tab and presses Enter
Precondition: User is authenticated and on the Kudos page
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Kudos page
2. Press Tab to focus on the "Viet Kudo" button
3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Modal opens correctly with focus trapped inside the modal

Test_Objective: Verify "Huy" (Cancel) button styling and position
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the footer action buttons
Expected_Result: "Huy" button displayed with icon + text style; positioned on the left side of the footer

Test_Objective: Verify "Gui" (Submit) button disabled state when form is incomplete
Precondition: Modal is open, required fields are empty
Steps:
1. Open the modal without filling any fields
2. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button displayed with yellow background but in disabled state (reduced opacity or grayed out); not clickable
Specs: Design item H.2: "Gui" disabled when required fields empty

Test_Objective: Verify "Gui" button enabled state when all required fields are filled
Precondition: Modal is open, all required fields filled
Steps:
1. Fill recipient, message, and at least 1 hashtag
2. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button displayed with yellow background in active/enabled state; clickable
Specs: Design item H.2: "Gui" enabled when all required filled

Test_Objective: Verify anonymous toggle checkbox and label display
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the anonymous toggle
Expected_Result: Toggle/checkbox is displayed unchecked by default; label "Gui an danh" is visible; description "Gui loi cam on va ghi nhan an danh" is shown
Specs: Design item G: "Gui an danh" toggle

Test_Objective: Verify display when anonymous toggle is enabled
Steps:
1. Click the anonymous toggle to enable it
2. Observe the toggle state and additional fields
Expected_Result: Toggle shows checked/enabled state; anonymous name text field becomes visible
Specs: Design item G: Toggle on shows name field

Test_Objective: Verify "Hashtag" label with "*" required marker
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the hashtag field label
Expected_Result: Label "Hashtag" displayed with red "*" indicating required field

Test_Objective: Verify "+ Hashtag" button and "Toi da 5" note are displayed
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the hashtag section
Expected_Result: "+ Hashtag" button and "Toi da 5" (Maximum 5) note are displayed correctly
Specs: Design item E: "+ Hashtag" button and note

Test_Objective: Verify added hashtags display as chips with remove button
Precondition: Modal is open, at least one hashtag is added
Steps:
1. Add a hashtag
2. Observe the chip display
Expected_Result: Hashtag displays as a chip/tag with text and "x" remove button; styling matches design
Specs: Design item E.2: Tag Group chips

Test_Objective: Verify display when 5 hashtags are added
Steps:
1. Add 5 hashtags
2. Observe the hashtag section
Expected_Result: All 5 hashtag chips are displayed; layout is not broken; "+ Hashtag" button behavior per spec (hidden or disabled)

Test_Objective: Verify image section displays label, button, and max note
Precondition: Modal is open, no images uploaded
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the image section
Expected_Result: "Image" label displayed; "+ Image" button with "Toi da 5" note visible; no thumbnails
Specs: Design items F.1, F.5: Image label and button

Test_Objective: Verify uploaded image thumbnail with remove button
Precondition: Modal is open, at least one image uploaded
Steps:
1. Upload an image
2. Observe the image thumbnails area
Expected_Result: Image thumbnail displayed with "x" remove button; correct size and alignment per design

Test_Objective: Verify display when maximum 5 images are uploaded
Steps:
1. Upload 5 images
2. Observe the image section
Expected_Result: All 5 thumbnails displayed in a row; "+ Image" button is hidden; layout is not broken
Specs: Design item F: Max 5 images, button hidden at 5

Test_Objective: Verify modal layout matches Figma design (size, padding, spacing, background color)
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal
2. Compare layout with Figma design (520:11602)
Expected_Result: Modal size, padding, margins, background color, border radius match the design specifications

Test_Objective: Verify overlay background appearance
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal
2. Observe the overlay behind the modal
Expected_Result: Semi-transparent dark overlay covers the entire viewport behind the modal

Test_Objective: Verify modal is scrollable when content exceeds viewport height
Precondition: Modal is open on a small screen or with many images/hashtags
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Add maximum images and hashtags to fill content
3. Observe scrollability
Expected_Result: Modal content is scrollable; header and footer action buttons remain accessible

Test_Objective: Verify "Nguoi nhan" label with "*" required marker is displayed
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the recipient field label
Expected_Result: Label "Nguoi nhan" is displayed with red "*" indicating required field

Test_Objective: Verify input field appearance with placeholder and dropdown icon
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the recipient input field
Expected_Result: Input field shows placeholder "Tim kiem"; dropdown arrow icon is visible on the right side; field dimensions match design (514x56px)

Test_Objective: Verify error styling when recipient field is empty on submit attempt
Precondition: Modal is open, recipient field is empty
Steps:
1. Attempt to submit the form without selecting a recipient
2. Observe the recipient field
Expected_Result: Field border turns red; error message is displayed below the field
Specs: Design item B.2: Error state with red border

Test_Objective: Verify modal layout on mobile viewport
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal on mobile viewport
2. Check all elements are visible and properly sized
Expected_Result: Modal adapts to mobile width; all fields are accessible; touch targets are at least 44x44px; no horizontal overflow

Test_Objective: Verify modal layout on tablet viewport
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal on tablet viewport
2. Check layout and spacing
Expected_Result: Modal displays correctly with appropriate width and spacing for tablet

Test_Objective: Verify modal layout on desktop viewport
Precondition: Browser viewport set to 1024px or wider
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal on desktop viewport
2. Check layout matches Figma design
Expected_Result: Modal displays centered with design-specified width; all elements properly laid out

Test_Objective: Verify modal displays correctly when browser zoom is changed
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Zoom in to 150%
3. Zoom out to 75%
Expected_Result: Modal layout is not broken at different zoom levels; all content remains accessible

Test_Objective: Verify all toolbar formatting buttons are displayed correctly
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the toolbar above the textarea
Expected_Result: All 6 buttons displayed in order: Bold (B), Italic (I), Strikethrough (S), Numbered list, Link, Quote; each with correct icon and positioning

Test_Objective: Verify textarea shows correct placeholder text
Precondition: Modal is open, textarea is empty
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe the textarea
Expected_Result: Placeholder text "Hay gui gam loi cam on va ghi nhan den dong doi tai day nhe!" is displayed in gray

Test_Objective: Verify hint text about "@" mention feature is displayed
Steps:
1. Open the modal
2. Observe below the textarea
Expected_Result: Hint text "Ban co the '@ + ten' de nhac toi dong nghiep khac" is displayed in small font below the textarea

Test_Objective: Verify toolbar buttons show active/toggled state when formatting is applied
Precondition: Modal is open, text is entered
Steps:
1. Type text in the textarea
2. Select text and click Bold button
3. Observe the Bold button state
Expected_Result: Bold button shows active/highlighted state when bold formatting is applied to selected text
Specs: Design item C.1: Bold toggle button

Test_Objective: Verify modal title text and styling
Steps:
1. Open the Viet Kudo modal
2. Observe the title area
Expected_Result: Title "Gui loi cam on va ghi nhan den dong doi" is displayed, large font, centered, matching design
Specs: Design item A: Label "Gui loi cam on va ghi nhan den dong doi"

Test_Objective: Verify toggling anonymous mode on shows the anonymous name field
Precondition: Modal is open, anonymous toggle is off
Steps: 1. Click the "Gui an danh" toggle
Expected_Result: Toggle becomes checked/enabled; anonymous name text field appears
Specs: Design item G: Toggle on shows name field

Test_Objective: Verify toggling anonymous mode off hides the anonymous name field
Precondition: Modal is open, anonymous toggle is on
Steps: 1. Click the "Gui an danh" toggle to disable it
Expected_Result: Toggle becomes unchecked; anonymous name text field is hidden
Specs: Design item G: Toggle off hides name field

Test_Objective: Verify kudo is sent anonymously when toggle is enabled
Precondition: Modal is open, all required fields filled, anonymous toggle is on
Steps:
1. Enable anonymous mode
2. Fill in all required fields
3. Click "Gui"
Expected_Result: Kudo is submitted successfully; sender identity is hidden in the kudo display

Test_Objective: Verify clicking "Huy" closes the modal when no data is entered
Precondition: Modal is open, no fields filled
Steps: 1. Click the "Huy" button
Expected_Result: Modal closes immediately; no data is saved
Specs: Design item H.1: Cancel closes modal

Test_Objective: Verify clicking "Huy" closes the modal and discards all entered data
Precondition: Modal is open, some fields filled
Steps:
1. Fill in recipient, message, and hashtags
2. Click "Huy"
Expected_Result: Modal closes; all entered data is discarded; no kudo is created
Specs: Design item H.1: Cancel discards changes

Test_Objective: Verify modal opens fresh after a previous cancel
Precondition: User previously opened and cancelled the modal
Steps:
1. Open the modal, fill some data, click "Huy"
2. Open the modal again
Expected_Result: Modal opens with all fields in default/empty state; no previously entered data is retained

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when user tries to send a kudo to themselves
Steps: 1. Search for and select own name in the recipient field
Expected_Result: System prevents self-kudo or shows appropriate message (per business rules)

Test_Objective: Verify message accepts and properly handles special characters
Steps:
1. Type message with special characters: <script>, HTML tags, emojis, Vietnamese diacritics
2. Submit the form
Expected_Result: Special characters are properly escaped/sanitized; no XSS; content displays correctly after submission

Test_Objective: Verify behavior with extremely long message text
Steps:
1. Paste a very long text (e.g., 10,000+ characters) into the textarea
2. Attempt to submit
Expected_Result: System handles gracefully; either allows submission or shows max length error

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when modal is opened in multiple browser tabs
Precondition: User is logged in in multiple tabs
Steps:
1. Open Viet Kudo modal in Tab 1
2. Open Viet Kudo modal in Tab 2
3. Submit kudo in both tabs
Expected_Result: Both submissions succeed independently; no conflicts or errors

Test_Objective: Verify kudo is successfully submitted with all valid data
Precondition: Modal is open, all required fields filled with valid data
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Type a gratitude message
3. Add 1-5 hashtags
4. Optionally upload images
5. Click "Gui"
Expected_Result: Loading state shown; form submits successfully; modal closes; kudo appears in the list

Test_Objective: Verify submission works with all fields (required + optional) filled
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Type a rich-text message with formatting and "@" mention
3. Add 5 hashtags
4. Upload 5 images
5. Enable anonymous mode
6. Click "Gui"
Expected_Result: Form submits successfully with all data; modal closes; kudo displays with all content
Specs: Design items B-H: Full form submission

Test_Objective: Verify loading indicator is shown during form submission
Steps:
1. Click "Gui"
2. Observe the button during submission
Expected_Result: "Gui" button shows loading state (spinner or disabled); prevents double submission

Test_Objective: Verify double-clicking submit does not create duplicate kudos
Steps: 1. Double-click the "Gui" button quickly
Expected_Result: Only one kudo is created; no duplicate submissions

Test_Objective: Verify error handling when network fails during submission
Precondition: All required fields filled, network connection interrupted
Steps:
1. Fill all required fields
2. Disconnect network
3. Click "Gui"
Expected_Result: Error message displayed; form data is preserved; user can retry after reconnecting

Test_Objective: Verify form cannot be submitted when all required fields are empty
Precondition: Modal is open, no fields filled
Steps: 1. Observe the "Gui" button without filling any fields
Expected_Result: "Gui" button is disabled and cannot be clicked
Specs: Design item H.2: Disabled when required fields empty

Test_Objective: Verify form cannot be submitted with only the recipient field filled
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Leave message and hashtag fields empty
3. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button remains disabled

Test_Objective: Verify form cannot be submitted with only the message filled
Steps:
1. Type a message in the textarea
2. Leave recipient and hashtag fields empty
3. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button remains disabled

Test_Objective: Verify form cannot be submitted with only hashtags added
Steps:
1. Add at least one hashtag
2. Leave recipient and message fields empty
3. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button remains disabled

Test_Objective: Verify form cannot be submitted without at least one hashtag
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Type a message
3. Do not add any hashtags
4. Observe the "Gui" button
Expected_Result: "Gui" button remains disabled
Specs: Design items E, H.2: Hashtag required

Test_Objective: Verify "Gui" button becomes enabled when all required fields have valid values
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Type a message
3. Add at least one hashtag
Expected_Result: "Gui" button becomes enabled/clickable
Specs: Design item H.2: Enable on valid data

Test_Objective: Verify form validation rejects message with only whitespace
Steps:
1. Select a recipient
2. Type only spaces in the textarea
3. Add a hashtag
4. Attempt to submit
Expected_Result: Validation error; form is not submitted; "Gui" button remains disabled or error shown

Test_Objective: Verify user can add a hashtag via the "+ Hashtag" button
Precondition: Modal is open, no hashtags added
Steps:
1. Click the "+ Hashtag" button
2. Select or type a hashtag from the dropdown
Expected_Result: Hashtag is added as a chip in the hashtag section
Specs: Design item E, E.2: Add hashtag

Test_Objective: Verify user can remove a hashtag by clicking "x" on the chip
Precondition: Modal is open, at least one hashtag is added
Steps: 1. Click the "x" button on a hashtag chip
Expected_Result: Hashtag chip is removed from the list
Specs: Design item E.2: Remove chip via "x"

Test_Objective: Verify user can add up to 5 hashtags
Steps: 1. Add 5 hashtags one by one
Expected_Result: All 5 hashtags display as chips; "+ Hashtag" button is hidden or disabled after 5th tag

Test_Objective: Verify system prevents adding more than 5 hashtags
Precondition: Modal is open, 5 hashtags already added
Steps: 1. Try to add a 6th hashtag
Expected_Result: Cannot add; "+ Hashtag" button is hidden or disabled; no error crash

Test_Objective: Verify removing a hashtag allows adding new ones again
Steps:
1. Remove one hashtag (click "x")
2. Click "+ Hashtag" to add a new one
Expected_Result: "+ Hashtag" button becomes available again; new hashtag can be added; total remains <= 5
Specs: Design item E: Max 5 with removal

Test_Objective: Verify user can upload an image via file picker
Steps:
1. Click the "+ Image" button
2. Select a valid image file (e.g., .jpg, .png)
Expected_Result: Image is uploaded and displayed as a thumbnail with "x" remove button
Specs: Design item F, F.5: Upload image

Test_Objective: Verify user can upload up to 5 images
Steps: 1. Upload 5 images one by one
Expected_Result: All 5 thumbnails displayed; "+ Image" button is hidden after 5th image
Specs: Design item F: Max 5, button hidden

Test_Objective: Verify system prevents uploading more than 5 images
Precondition: Modal is open, 5 images already uploaded
Steps: 1. Observe the "+ Image" button
Expected_Result: "+ Image" button is hidden; no way to upload additional images
Specs: Design item F: Max 5, button hidden at 5

Test_Objective: Verify user can remove an image by clicking "x" on thumbnail
Precondition: Modal is open, at least one image uploaded
Steps: 1. Click the "x" button on an image thumbnail
Expected_Result: Image is removed from the list; "+ Image" button reappears if count was at 5

Test_Objective: Verify error when uploading a non-image file
Steps:
1. Click "+ Image"
2. Select a non-image file (e.g., .csv, .txt, .mp3)
Expected_Result: Error message displayed; file is not uploaded

Test_Objective: Verify error when uploading an image that exceeds maximum file size
Test_Data: Image file larger than max allowed size
Steps:
1. Click "+ Image"
2. Select an image file larger than the allowed maximum size
Expected_Result: Error message displayed; file is not uploaded

Test_Objective: Verify removing images allows uploading new ones
Steps:
1. Remove one image
2. Upload a new image
Expected_Result: "+ Image" button reappears after removal; new image can be uploaded; total remains <= 5

Test_Objective: Verify typing "@" followed by text triggers mention suggestions
Steps:
1. Click in the textarea
2. Type "@" followed by a colleague's name
Expected_Result: Mention autocomplete dropdown appears with matching colleague names

Test_Objective: Verify clicking a mention suggestion inserts the mention
Precondition: Modal is open, mention suggestions are visible
Steps:
1. Type "@nam" in the textarea
2. Click on a suggested colleague name
Expected_Result: Mention is inserted into the text (formatted/highlighted); autocomplete dropdown closes

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when "@" mention finds no matches
Steps: 1. Type "@zzznonexistent" in the textarea
Expected_Result: No suggestions shown or "No results" message displayed; user can continue typing normally

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when clicking outside the modal overlay
Steps: 1. Click on the overlay area outside the modal
Expected_Result: Modal closes or stays open per specification; if data was entered, confirm discard behavior

Test_Objective: Verify pressing ESC key closes the modal
Steps: 1. Press the ESC key
Expected_Result: Modal closes; entered data is discarded

Test_Objective: Verify Tab key navigates through form fields in correct order
Steps:
1. Press Tab repeatedly
2. Observe focus movement
Expected_Result: Focus moves through fields in logical order: Recipient -> Toolbar buttons -> Textarea -> Hashtag -> Image -> Anonymous toggle -> Cancel -> Submit; focus is trapped within modal

Test_Objective: Verify background page does not scroll while modal is open
Precondition: Modal is open, background page has scrollable content
Steps: 1. Attempt to scroll the page behind the modal
Expected_Result: Background page does not scroll; modal stays in position

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when page is reloaded with modal open
Precondition: Modal is open, some data entered
Steps: 1. Press F5 or Ctrl+R to reload the page
Expected_Result: Page reloads; modal is closed; all entered data is lost

Test_Objective: Verify autocomplete suggestions appear when typing in the recipient field
Steps:
1. Click on the recipient input field
2. Type at least 1 character of a colleague's name
Expected_Result: Dropdown shows filtered suggestions matching the input; results update as user types

Test_Objective: Verify selecting a recipient from the dropdown populates the field
Precondition: Modal is open, autocomplete suggestions are visible
Steps:
1. Type a search query in the recipient field
2. Click on a suggested name from the dropdown
Expected_Result: Selected name is populated in the recipient field; dropdown closes
Specs: Design item B.2: Select from list

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when search query returns no matches
Steps: 1. Type a non-existent name in the recipient field (e.g., "zzzxxx999")
Expected_Result: Dropdown shows no results or "No results found" message

Test_Objective: Verify user can clear the selected recipient and search again
Precondition: Modal is open, a recipient is already selected
Steps:
1. Clear the recipient field
2. Type a new search query
Expected_Result: Previous recipient is removed; new autocomplete suggestions appear

Test_Objective: Verify clicking the dropdown arrow opens the recipient list
Steps: 1. Click the dropdown arrow icon on the recipient field
Expected_Result: Dropdown opens showing available recipients to select from
Specs: Design item B.2: Dropdown IC icon

Test_Objective: Verify bold formatting can be toggled on selected text
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Type text in the textarea
2. Select a portion of text
3. Click the Bold (B) button
Expected_Result: Selected text becomes bold; clicking Bold again removes bold formatting

Test_Objective: Verify italic formatting can be toggled on selected text
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Type text in the textarea
2. Select a portion of text
3. Click the Italic (I) button
Expected_Result: Selected text becomes italic; clicking Italic again removes italic formatting

Test_Objective: Verify strikethrough formatting can be toggled on selected text
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Type text in the textarea
2. Select a portion of text
3. Click the Strikethrough (S) button
Expected_Result: Selected text gets strikethrough; clicking again removes it

Test_Objective: Verify numbered list can be toggled
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Type multiple lines of text
2. Select the lines
3. Click the Numbered list button
Expected_Result: Lines are formatted as a numbered list; clicking again removes numbering
Specs: Design item C.4: Number list toggle

Test_Objective: Verify link insertion via the link toolbar button
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Select text in the textarea
2. Click the Link button
3. Enter a URL in the dialog
4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Selected text becomes a hyperlink; link URL is correctly associated

Test_Objective: Verify quote/blockquote formatting can be toggled
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Type text in the textarea
2. Select a paragraph
3. Click the Quote button
Expected_Result: Selected paragraph displays in blockquote format; clicking again removes quote formatting

Test_Objective: Verify multiple formatting options can be applied to the same text
Precondition: Modal is open, text is typed in the textarea
Steps:
1. Select text
2. Apply Bold
3. Apply Italic
Expected_Result: Text is both bold and italic simultaneously
